fixes.post_fix_expected: read-only inspector with lock banner + disabled controls + escalate link
fixes.evidence_desktop: Lock-icon banner reads 'Human Interaction Gate - read-only for support access. Controls are disabled. Escalate to a platform-admin for any change.' Pending Review Queue visible with 5 items; right pane shows 'Read-only inspector - click an item for context'. Approve/Reject/Escalate buttons rendered in muted/outline style; Defer and Request info are disabled-grey. 'Escalate to platform-admin ->' link at footer.
fixes.evidence_tablet: Same lock banner, same read-only inspector label, same dim action row, same escalate link. Right pane stacks slightly but content identical.
fixes.evidence_mobile: Sidebar collapsed to hamburger; lock banner wraps to 2 lines; queue list + inspector stacked. Action buttons shrink but lock state preserved; escalate link visible.
fixes.notes: Exemplary pattern matched (lock banner + disabled fieldset style + escalate). No deny page regression. Domain fields (GIG-8412, 84% confidence, $420.00) populate correctly - useful inspector context.

fixes.post_fix_expected: read-only inspector with visible lock banner + disabled CRUD controls + escalate-to-admin link
fixes.evidence_desktop: Lock banner 'OSS Curriculum - read-only for support access. Controls are disabled. Escalate to a platform-admin for any change.' Curriculum Modules Published: 142, Community Submissions Pending: 8, Shadow Run Grade Trend 87% improving. Tier 1-5 assignment cards + Shadow Runs list shown read-only (no Create/Edit/Delete buttons visible). Escalate link at bottom.
fixes.evidence_tablet: Same banner wrapping to 2 lines. KPI row wraps; tier cards remain horizontally scrollable set; shadow runs list intact. Escalate link visible.
fixes.evidence_mobile: Hamburger + EN selector at top, banner wraps to 4 lines. KPIs stack. Tier cards in compact row. Escalate link at footer.
fixes.notes: No CRUD affordances visible (correct - platform-support should only inspect). DPO triples classification visible (7 triples). No deny regression.

fixes.post_fix_expected: read-only inspector with lock banner + disabled Install/Remove buttons + Escalate
fixes.evidence_desktop: Lock banner 'Marketplace Plugin Adapter - read-only for support access. Controls are disabled. Escalate to a platform-admin for any change.' Adapter Lifecycle topology canvas (8 states) with 'read-only inspector' label. KPIs: Pending Security Scan 8 plugins, Failed Security Review 2, Approved This Week 23. Right-side Translation Phase inspector shows Payload translated / Running. Zoom controls (+/-/fit) present but no Install/Remove buttons. Escalate link at footer.
fixes.evidence_tablet: Canvas replaced with vertical state list (Adapter registered, Handshake pending, Plugin connected, Payload translating, Payload translated, Synced, Schema mismatch, Rate limited) each with phase + description + next transition. No install controls. Escalate link present.
fixes.evidence_mobile: Same vertical state list, compressed. All 8 states listed with phase/status chips. No CRUD. Escalate link present.
fixes.notes: Install/Remove buttons absent (correct for read-only). Topology drill-down works progressively (canvas on desktop, list on narrower viewports) - matches the progressive drill-down feedback preference. No deny regression.

fixes.post_fix_expected: curated plugin list - Eventbrite Sync, Zoom Webinars, Stripe Tickets - with event-organiser framing
fixes.evidence_desktop: Tenant-module shell (sidebar: Dashboard/Marketplace/Events/RSVP/Attendance - no engine nav). Blue framing banner: 'Plugins relevant to events - connect your event tools to automate ticketing, webinars, and attendee communications.' Heading 'Event-ready plugins'. Three cards: Eventbrite Sync (Events category, Free, Security Verified), Zoom Webinars (Webinars, $4.99/mo, Security Verified), Stripe Tickets (Payments, Free, Security Verified). Each has blue 'Install via Events ->' CTA. Footer hint 'Looking for more? The full plugin catalog is available once installed via your event workspace.'
fixes.evidence_tablet: Same 3 cards side-by-side, slightly narrower. Event framing banner wraps.
fixes.evidence_mobile: Cards stack vertically. All 3 plugins present in correct order (Eventbrite Sync, Zoom Webinars, Stripe Tickets). Event framing preserved.
fixes.notes: All 3 required plugins present with correct categories. Event-organiser framing is explicit ('relevant to events', 'Install via Events', 'event workspace'). No admin controls leaked. Consumer shell correct (no ENGINE sidebar section).
